title: Improved Bow
description: This is a bow mod that can be upgraded. At the last level, you can shoot like a machine gun, with three arrows at once, and one of them will burn
body:
![Craft](https://i.imgur.com/YkUfhO8.png)
# About Improved Bow
You can craft a regular bow, which you can later upgrade to a dragon bow. He will have huge damage, fast charging, and he also shoots three arrows, one of which is on fire

If you are a brave minecrafter, then go down into the mine for bloody ore and make a cool bow out of it

Blood Ore will allow you to craft a bow that is better than a regular bow. Later, you can upgrade it to the coolest bow. In addition to blood ore, the mine contains teranite ore. It will help you upgrade your bow to level 2. And so on to the third. Bow crafting can be seen below

# Future updates
- Aim at the last level
